summary: Conduct a comprehensive HIPAA compliance audit covering Privacy Rule, Security Rule, and Breach Notification requirements.

inputs.name: systems_inventory
inputs.description: List of systems that create, receive, maintain, or transmit PHI.

inputs.name: current_policies
inputs.description: Current HIPAA policies and procedures documentation.

inputs.name: phi_data_flows
inputs.description: Data flow diagrams showing PHI movement between systems.

inputs.name: previous_audit
inputs.description: Results from previous HIPAA audits or assessments.

inputs.name: business_associates
inputs.description: List of Business Associates and their BAA status.

outputs.name: compliance_matrix
outputs.description: Matrix mapping HIPAA requirements to current controls and compliance status.

outputs.name: gap_analysis
outputs.description: Detailed analysis of compliance gaps with risk ratings.

outputs.name: remediation_plan
outputs.description: Prioritized plan to address gaps with timelines and owners.

outputs.name: risk_assessment
outputs.description: Updated risk assessment per HIPAA Security Rule requirements.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is HIPAA compliance audit, not general security or GDPR.
Require systems inventory and current policies before assessment.
Verify no PHI appears in audit outputs.
Output must include compliance matrix, gap analysis, and remediation plan.

steps.action: Catalog all systems that handle PHI and map data flows.
Evaluate Privacy Rule compliance including NPP, minimum necessary, and patient rights.
Evaluate administrative, physical, and technical safeguards per Security Rule.
Review breach detection, reporting, and notification procedures.
Validate Business Associate Agreements and oversight procedures.
Compile findings into prioritized remediation plan with risk ratings.

success_criteria: Every HIPAA requirement is mapped to a control or identified as a gap.
Risk assessment is current and covers all ePHI systems.
Remediation plan is prioritized by risk with timelines and owners.
No PHI appears in any audit output.
All Business Associate Agreements are validated.
